content: 1. Admin assign-technician dropdown instead of Claim (WO popout, Kanban, breakdowns)
2. Block breakdown closure without an assigned technician (backend rule + repair page UI)
3. Remove redundant 'Start Repair Now' button on repair page
4. Fix AWS Life % not functioning (hours-since-failure runtime source)
5. Remove Corrective WO-type choice from Report Warning (always Inspection)
6. Thorough review of ALL calculations (kpi_engine, reliability, analytics, downtime, durations)
7. Test everything + final summary of changes & calculation logic
